steps.title: Use the praise after the colon
steps.content: The phrase there is no better example of the form explains the blank. The speaker is saying that Mildred Jean Walter's work has not been surpassed.

steps.title: Remove weaker verb meanings
steps.content: Choice A means gathered, which does not fit a comparison of literary quality. Choice B means referenced, but the passage is about being better than Walter's work. Choice D means added to or increased, not surpassed. The answer is C.
